stat.title: Error-Assisted Runs
stat.subtitle: Runs scored with an error in the play.

notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · 1–7 · Alex Freeland reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Zach Neto. Max Muncy scores. Ryan Ward scores. Dalton Rushing scores. Alex Freeland to 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 5 · 2–3 · Brewers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Brice Turang singles on a line drive to right fielder Jake Fraley. Gary Sánchez scores. Brandon Lockridge scores. Joey Ortiz scores. Brice Turang to 2nd. Brice Turang advances to 2nd, on a missed catch error by center fielder Cedric Mullins, assist to right fielder Jake Fraley.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · 0–3 · Carson Benge singles on a ground ball to pitcher Seth Lugo. A.J. Ewing scores. Bo Bichette scores. Carson Benge scores. Throwing error by pitcher Seth Lugo. Throwing error by first baseman Jac Caglianone. Throwing error by third baseman Nick Loftin.

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · 0–3 · Zack Gelof singles on a ground ball to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Nick Kurtz scores. Tyler Soderstrom scores. Jacob Wilson scores. Zack Gelof to 2nd. Zack Gelof advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 8 · 6–3 · Ketel Marte doubles (18) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Pavin Smith scores. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.
